Risk: Finance Analysts have too narrow a view of the project, so that they can't validate assumptions, or see improvements
Mitigation: Invite finance analysts to phase 1 brief

Risk: Collections agents will reject the portal if it comes back with no context
Collections agents will lose confidence in the portal if escalation path is unclear
Mitigation: Make escalation pathway clear in workflow

Risk: Customers will be unaware of portal
Mitigation: Send out messages telling customers about portal through many different streams

Risk: Customers will abandon portal because it's complex
